hero.title: Your Church, Always Organized
hero.sub: A complete platform to plan services, manage teams, archive songs and coordinate volunteers — all in the cloud!

team.title: One space for all your teams.
team.sub: ChurchLab is designed to simplify team management.

features.title: A Platform Designed for You
features.sub: Simplify your community management with powerful, easy-to-use tools.

items.title: Intuitive Planning
items.desc: Create and share detailed runsheets for every service in minutes.

items.title: Centralized Song Archive
items.desc: Manage lyrics and chords. Transpose keys with a single click.

items.title: Simple Team Management
items.desc: Organize volunteer shifts and send automatic reminders.

items.title: Defined Roles & Teams
items.desc: Assign clear responsibilities for seamless collaboration.

items.title: Cloud Access Anywhere
items.desc: Sync your data and access the platform from any device.

items.title: Clean & Easy Design
items.desc: An interface that needs no training, ready to use immediately.

steps.title: Get Started in 3 Simple Steps
steps.sub: Switching to ChurchLab is a quick and intuitive process.

items.title: Create Your Account
items.body: Sign up for free in less than a minute. No credit card required.

items.title: Invite Your Team
items.body: Add your pastors, musicians and volunteers to start collaborating right away.

items.title: Start Planning
items.body: Create your first service, add songs and assign roles. It really is that simple.

calendar.title: A scalable system that adapts to your needs.
calendar.sub: Create shifts, assign roles, send reminders and build a harmonious organizational flow.
